creator: chris.torek@gmail.com
text:
There's a typo (well maybe that's slightly generous :-) ) in the Makefile now:

liblz4.so:archivers/lz4

should read:

liblz4.so:archivers/liblz4

Building with "synth" detects this:

x11-toolkits/vte3 scan aborted because dependency could not be located.
liblz4.so:archivers/lz4 (required dependency of x11-toolkits/vte3) does not exist.
Scan of x11/xfce4-terminal failed, it will not be considered.
